profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and language preferences
profile.display_name_placeholder: How you want to be called
profile.email_description: Your email is used for login and notifications.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Manage your password and account security
security.change_password_description: Choose a strong password that you don't use elsewhere.

active_sessions.title: Active Sessions
active_sessions.description: You are currently logged in on this device.

tutorials.title: Tutorials
tutorials.subtitle: Review the contextual guides or choose which ones should appear again on your next visit.

general.title: General Settings
general.subtitle: Manage your workspace identity and preferences

fields.name: Workspace name
fields.source_language_hint: Default source language for new projects in this workspace.

danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.delete_description: Once you delete a workspace, there is no going back. All projects will be deleted.

members.title: Team Members
members.subtitle: Manage who has access to this workspace and their roles

invitation.title: Invite new member
invitation.description: Send an email invitation to collaborate in this workspace.

members.pending_description: Pending invitations reserve a member seat until accepted, revoked, or expired.

deleted_projects.title: Deleted Projects
deleted_projects.subtitle: Recover deleted projects that have snapshots available

empty.title: No deleted projects
empty.description: Deleted projects with available snapshots will appear here.

deleted_projects.no_snapshots: No snapshots available for this project.

recover_modal.title: Recover project?
recover_modal.description: This will create a new project from snapshot v{number}. The recovered project will appear in your workspace.
